name: moxywolf-plugins
description: Canonical MoxyWolf plugin marketplace. Hosts every plugin authored by MoxyWolf LLC plus a bundle of the standalone skills used across the team. Source of truth lives in the MoxyWolf Vault on Google Drive.

plugins.name: board-deck
plugins.description: Generate MoxyWolf monthly board deck from LivePlan, GA4, Taskade, and GitHub data.

plugins.name: bibtex-builder
plugins.description: Build and enrich BibTeX bibliographies with AI-generated abstracts from URLs or uploaded .bib files.

plugins.name: council
plugins.description: Multi-model AI deliberation with vault-aware institutional memory — structured consensus from multiple LLMs with self-learning routing, self-improving prompts, and bidirectional Obsidian vault integration.

plugins.name: daily-ops
plugins.description: Energy-aware personal operations system with Inbox Intelligence and Fitness Coach. Combines Apple HealthKit/Oura, Google Calendar, Gmail, Google Drive tasks, and an Apple-Health-aware daily workout coach.

plugins.name: dev-infrastructure-skills
plugins.description: Framework-specific development best practices for React, Next.js, Supabase/Postgres, TDD, and Playwright E2E testing.

plugins.name: editorial-forge
plugins.description: Transform AI-generated content into author-owned work through structured editorial judgment, voice extraction, and Sorkin DOB narrative framing — with a complete authorship record.

plugins.name: gstack-execution
plugins.description: Software development execution engine adapted from Garry Tan's gstack (MIT). Code review, security audit, debugging, QA testing, and shipping. Pairs with product-orchestrator.

plugins.name: obsidian-update
plugins.description: Vault-native personal operating system with Council integration. Energy-aware daily ops, three-layer persistent memory, Kanban task management, and session knowledge extraction into the MoxyWolf Obsidian vault.

plugins.name: product-orchestrator
plugins.description: Product decision engine that wraps Council deliberation with product-specific role prompts for scope, architecture, and GTM decisions. Maintains decision records in the Obsidian vault.

plugins.name: project-init
plugins.description: Cowork project lifecycle for MoxyWolf projects. /init-project, /session-start, /session-end — scaffolds project instructions, handles session handoffs (with auto-written `author` / `for` baton-pass frontmatter), refreshes GitHub READMEs, and captures durable knowledge.

plugins.name: research-pipeline
plugins.description: End-to-end academic research pipeline: literature discovery, citation verification, thematic synthesis, and perspective-driven content generation. AutoResearchClaw-inspired.

plugins.name: saas-frontend-designer
plugins.description: Full-pipeline front-end design system for SaaS products and marketing sites. Generates, polishes, audits, and optimizes production-ready Next.js + React + Tailwind + shadcn/ui interfaces.

plugins.name: saas-pricing-engine
plugins.description: End-to-end SaaS and API gateway pricing research, modeling, and copywriting. Combines competitor intelligence, pricing frameworks (Van Westendorp, Gabor-Granger, value-based), and conversion-optimized pricing-page generation.

plugins.name: team-kanban
plugins.description: Aggregates tasks from Obsidian Kanban, Google Drive, Google Calendar, Gmail, and Slack into a team-visible Slack Canvas kanban board with dual-authority completion and automatic sync-back.

plugins.name: vtt-to-text
plugins.description: Converts pasted WebVTT closed-caption content into clean, readable text. Strips timestamps, merges into flowing paragraphs.

plugins.name: moxywolf-skills
plugins.description: Bundle of 26 standalone skills used across MoxyWolf work — voice, brand, content ecosystems, plus the Anthropic-shipped reference skills, packaged as one installable plugin.
